title: Parts of Eva You Found Unintentionally Funny
display_title: Parts of Eva You Found Unintentionally Funny
wikitext:
[]: Parts of Eva You Found Unintentionally Funny             Quote Post by Hellfire » Wed Jan 14, 2009 9:36 pm Were there any parts of Evangelion that made you laugh, chuckle, or that you found slightly humorous that you are pretty sure was not supposed to? I just got done watching the series from beginning to end last night (including EoE) and there are a few things I can think of that got that kind of reaction out of me. Some because the event was actually kind of funny, and some as a kind of nervous laugh due to not knowing how else to react: -Evangelion Unit 01, at times. Just because of the way it moved and the sounds it made. It reminded me of some big, stupid beast with the way it seemed to react sometimes, even though the soul of an intelligent being resided within it. The parts I'm thinking of in particular are: the point in episode 20 where Shinji synchronized with it by 400%, and it was slowly looking around at everything and growling; in EoE when it bursted its way out of GNR's forehead eye and made that brief roar after Shinji rejected Instrumentality. It was all like, " Fuck you , forehead eye!" -I don't remember what episode it was, but the point when Asuka really started to lose it, and they looped the same animations of her over and over again (by the fifth or sixth loop. Someone else actually chuckled at it first, and that's what probably got me.) -In EoE, Shinji's hysterical grin as he is confronted by GNR for the first time. I realize he was freaking out at the sight, but that face... -In EoE, when GNR passed through Maya, the way Maya freaked out. Although I might do something similar if that happened to me... That's all I've got for now. I assure you all that I think NGE is awesome, and these things I found "unintentionally funny" did not detract from the experience for me at all, and were in fact far and in between. In short, I'm starting this thread as a way to bash Eva; just making observations, and seeing if anyone else has any similar observations. Furthermore, if I suck for posting this thread for some other reason, my deepest apologies. Anyhoo...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jan 14, 2009 11:12 pm I got a chuckle (in repeated viewings, anyway) from psycho-shinji's leer at zeruel in anticipation of a satisfying 'pop' noise when that head he was pulling on finally came off. Asuka's similar reaction to shotgunning one of the MPE's in the face with the pylon-mounted spike gun also amused me. ...but come to think of it, why the hell didn't she use that trick in ep8?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Jan 14, 2009 11:25 pm the angel and eva voices in the Japanese audio track.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Wed Jan 14, 2009 11:50 pm Shinji masturbating to Asuka's comatose form. [/hell]

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Jan 14, 2009 11:54 pm The Kaji/Misato sex marathon(s)

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Thu Jan 15, 2009 12:07 am InB4 Shammy looks like a penis.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 15, 2009 1:53 am ZapalacX wrote: InB4 Shammy looks like a penis.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Thu Jan 15, 2009 12:05 pm Shinji's screams in the dub ( Especially the EoE dub) Mitsuishi Kotono butchering the phrase "You are number one." That little rainbow that appears when Shinji accidentally gropes Rei. Black Hyuga.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Thu Jan 15, 2009 12:14 pm The beaky nose of that one Seele guy...but I feel guilty for and compassionate about that, too...

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Thu Jan 15, 2009 2:36 pm Aoba muttering "Speak of the devil..." in EoE. The creepy grin on GNR when she's disintegrating toward the end of EoE. And of course, Fuyutsuki facepalming at the end of Episode nine :: Points to sig::

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Jan 15, 2009 3:05 pm Aoba was awesome in EoE. Such a sarcastic bastard.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Fri Jan 16, 2009 12:30 pm All of episode 19. Whether it was Eva-01 sounding like an orgasming monkey, the fate of Zeruel, or Asuka failing miserably, episode 19 was just too unintentially funny.

[]:             Quote Post by Annihilationscape » Fri Jan 16, 2009 12:54 pm While this was not my reaction the first time I saw this, I read someone's reaction to the scene in which Asuka was being 'mind-raped' by Aerael (sp? was that the right one even...?), and the "Hallelujah!" chorus played, and they laughed... Ever since then I, too, have chuckled during that particular scene... even though the music is actually quite beautifully placed, with its joyful refrains and message versus the awful thing happening to Asuka. Also, most of Shinj and Asuka's 'friendly' interactions shortly after she was first introduced were, looking back, probably deceptively funny... While they might make you laugh at first, knowing what we know now might make looking back on those scenes seem just a bit more bleak. There is an undercurrent of deep truth running through their bickerings.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Fri Jan 16, 2009 2:06 pm Annihilationscape wrote: While this was not my reaction the first time I saw this, I read someone's reaction to the scene in which Asuka was being 'mind-raped' by Aerael (sp? was that the right one even...?), and the "Hallelujah!" chorus played, and they laughed... Ever since then I, too, have chuckled during that particular scene... even though the music is actually quite beautifully placed, with its joyful refrains and message versus the awful thing happening to Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Jan 16, 2009 2:11 pm OH GOD BLACK HYUGA

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Jan 16, 2009 2:52 pm The masturbating scene in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Fri Jan 16, 2009 3:13 pm slothen wrote: OH GOD BLACK HYUGA

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 16, 2009 3:57 pm ~EoE dubSpike Spencer screams. I just lose it and start laughing. Sad, considering it's NOT supposed to be funny... ~Pencil breaking guy in episode 01. ~Dub Black Hyuga in EoE. ~Hyuga's "Good morning" to Misato in EoE...not such a nice morning with 3I around the corner, now is it? ~I can't remember exact details with this one scene, but either some guy getting stepped on or somebody flailing about before they died that just makes me lose it. Somewhere in the series as opposed to EoE, I'm just not sure where.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Jan 16, 2009 4:42 pm I laugh every time when Misato goes like "it's not like I'm going to molest him you know" in ep 2

[]:             Quote Post by Annihilationscape » Fri Jan 16, 2009 7:27 pm I almost forgot - in EoE, in the dub, the flamethrower scene! ::FWOOOSH:: NERV Guy : Aaaaauuugghhhh!!! Soldier : Hit 'em again! ::FWOOOSH:: NERV Guy : Aaaaauuugghhhh!!!
